entry.title: Re: Unable to retrieve data from OData API for Reports fr...

entry.title: Re: OAuth Client Credentials Along with User Password Credentials in SAP CPI Receiver

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Re: Unable to retrieve data from OData API for Reports fr...
entry.content:
Hello.

I managed to run successfully using a standard ByD report FINGLAU04_Q0001 (Financial Statement) via ana_businessanalytics_analytics.svc services. 

 

The only problem to use this standard report is that there are extension fields which business needs and these extension fields are not included in the standard report.

I was trying to use another custom report based on a joint data source with all the extension fields that we need.

But the custom report is not retrieving data as expected. 

I still believe it must be something to do with the way the custom report was built using selection default values or default selection variants in ByD.

Filter in financial reports - Most financial reports and data sources have mandatory selection parameters like company and set of book.
In particular all reports based on financial balance data sources (for example report Trial Balance based on data source FINGLAU01) require to set the mandatory default selection values or filter parameters: company (COMPANY), set of books (SETOFBKS), fiscal year (FISCYEAR) and fiscal period (FISCPER). The report returns no data if those selection/filter values are not provided.

Using Filter and Selection Parameter in ByD OData for Analytics.

Regards,

Sergio

entry.title: Re: Synchronizing only some ChangeSet Creation requests
entry.content:
Ok, i add also the tag, sorry.

I think I explained the request badly.

We using ChangeSet because the using of deep/link creation(Head/Item) is not supported in the Offline Scenario.

With ChangeSet actually we had no problems, we can create correctly the Orders sending in the ChangeSet the CreateEntity of Head, Items and Texts.

What i need to know is if there is a way to not sync all the finalized ChangeSet requests that would to be synced.

For Example:

  • Save 1 -> Created Order L1234 (Queued, to be Synced)
  • Save 2 -> Created Order L1235 (Queued, to be Synced)
  • Save 3 -> Created Order L1236 (Queued, to be Synced)

Now the Offline Store had 3 Orders queued and to be synced.

When user use the UploadOffline Sync Action the app process Order L1234, L1235 and L1236 in sequence.

If I want to process for example only the L1234 instead of processing all the Orders in sequence, is this possible or not ?

Thank You.

entry.title: Can I create a JDBC Connection Destination (HANA GCP DB) in BTP?
entry.content:
I'd like to be able to create an SAP Build Apps application that interacts with an Incentive Management HANA DB in GCP.  The connection in Advanced Workflow is a JDBC connection and I have the credentials for it.

Is it possible to create a Destination in BTP for that connection? There doesn't seem to be a JDBC "connection type" available.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Ron

entry.title: Re: OAuth 2.0 Authentication for SAP PI/PO REST Sender Channel
entry.content:
Hello,

Great blog. We have hardcoded the token in our rest rcvr channel (Bearer xxxx), wanted to understand if there is any string length limit while hardcoding the token under HTTP headers in SAP PO REST channel.

entry.title: Re: Excel Multi-Chapter Content Refresh
entry.content: Sorry @Eyal_Feiler, I have read your question wrong, I thought you meant mass update in-between DM chapters. For the external Excel data source, Marc is right - we can suggest to use DM Batch tool to mass update chapters from Excel.

entry.title: Re: Editable Data Table and Searches
entry.content:
Thank you Bill.

You Wrote "you could dynamically generate a page of all the items added with the default quantity field pre-populated".

What this means exactly ?

A page with a Data Table with all the added items and editable quantity column ?

entry.title: Re: Error Message for Posting Date Outside Scheduled Date...
entry.content:
Hello

This check does not exist in standard, but you can implement your own check using method AT_SAVE of BAdI WORKORDER_CONFIRM. 

If you are using S/4HANA, you can also use Fiori app Custom Logic and BAdI BD_WORKORDER_CONFIRM.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content:
Hello,

I think your hint is correct,

I found in the documentation the format to add database users.

{
	...
	"dbusers":{
		"<Space_ID>#<DB_UserName>":{
		  "ingestion":{
			"auditing":{
			  "dppRead":{
				"retentionPeriod":<days>
				"isAuditPolicyActive":false
			  },
			  "dppChange":{
				"retentionPeriod":<days>
				"isAuditPolicyActive":false
			  }
			}
		  },
		  "consumption":{
			"consumptionWithGrant":false,
			"spaceSchemaAccess":false,
			"scriptServerAccess":false,
			"localSchemaAccess":false,
			"hdiGrantorForCupsAccess":false
		  }
		}
	  }
	}

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/d0ecd6f297ac40249072a44df0549c1a/3fcbf619f2774b849fa7df58163b3609.html?locale=en-US#database-users

I am a bit worried of resetting and retrieving passwords (probably this requires a little scripting on the terminal).

But it seems feasible.

Thank you

I check other reports and exist a button to group values in table line.

 

How could i add this button in RAP application?

entry.title: Type of list report
entry.content:
Hi!

I understand that we have some table types for list report as:

  • ResponsiveTable
  • GridTable
  • AnalyticalTable
  • TreeTable

I'm creating a RAP with eclipse, and when i execute my service binding, the table type used is always Responsive table. How can i change it? 

I know that we can change it by manifest.json, but i would like to know if has any way to change it in eclipse, using some annotation in metadata extension, or something like that.

entry.title: Re: Groovy or XSLT to remove XML Tag(not values) in sap c...
entry.content:
Hi Nagesh,

Thanks for your help. This code works fine, but it fails when there is assigned to field sent.

<AssignedTo>ABC XYZ <ABC.XYZ@gmail.com></AssignedTo>

 

 
Error Details
net.sf.saxon.trans.XPathException: Error reported by XML parser: Unexpected character '@' (code 64) expected space, or '>' or "/>" at [row,col {unknown-source}]: [6,49}
 
Can we format the XSLT like to check only in AdditionalComments field if that is present or ignore the AssignedTo field for the check?
 
Thanks,
Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Re: The order of payload when using Odata adapter in SAP CPI
entry.content: In XML, the order is irrelevant. As long as the element hierarchy is correct (which seems to be the case), the order will not matter.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning for Expenses based on Income ratio for t...
entry.content: Hi @Wahid, in my previous comment, "Sales" and "Percentage" are calculated measures. Calculated measure "Sales" is derived based on "GL_Account = Sales". Hence you don't need to hardcode other GL_Accounts in your formulas.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: My pretty cat called Dori<3

entry.title: Re: Type of list report
entry.content: no, if I am not wrong.

entry.title: Catalog Object Grant ACCESS Issue in HANA DB
entry.content:
Hello All,

Could you please help with your inputs on the below case.

We have one HANA Stored Procedure. This is a directly created as a Catalog object by some Developer & that got migrated to Production as well.  He is the Owner of that Procedure , as its created by his ID.

Now that Developer has left the Organization , we want to grant that Procedure ( Catalog object) with EXECUTE privilege to some Technical ID which needs to call that procedure from external system ( ex: Informatica).

How can we assign that access to that technical ID , as the Developer is no longer available? 

In this case SYSTEM user also will not have access to grant access to other except the Owner.

Br

Kiran K

Please pass you contract end date as request date and simulation as ABAP true,then you will get the bits till the end date of contract for the recurring period.

Thank you

JP

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer (value adjustment)
entry.content:
Asset capitalization date for sender asset wan in 2022 and for receiver asset in 2024 

there is no any change the master data for receiver asset. 

the transfer happen in 2024 

 

the value adjustment is seems as accum dep. in the sender asset transfer to receiver asset and this is impact to decrease the NBV for the receiver asset my inquiry is how i can remove or correct this value adjustment since the receiver asset is land and the land shall not depreciate it !

entry.title: Re: Editable Data Table and Searches
entry.content:
A page with Editable Data Table would be one option but you also mentioned it not being available on the web client.

Another would be a page of Form Cells or combination of Section/FormCell. I am thinking maybe a title form cell for the item and then a simple property for the quantity pair for each item.  Could also include more depending on what you needed to show for each item.  Could also do an Object cell followed by a simple property for the quantity for each item.  All depends on what you want / need.

You would generate most of the page dynamically based on the selected items and then need a rule on the Save to process all the data accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Is it time to switch to OData v4?
entry.content:
Hi @boolan79,

> For example, I am struggling at the moment with floating numbers - the OData protocol is automatically set to ver. 4.01 which is unsupported by Fiori Elements. But you don't know why it changed to 4.01.

the scale="floating" of Edm.Decimal is a feature that is introduced with OData version 4.01. Hence, when it is getting used in the metadata, the RAP backend tells that the metadata is for version 4.01. 

The UI5 client is so far not able to handle the scale="floating" feature and cannot handle 4.01 metadata. This is a gap that is known but not yet closed.

As a consequence, you may not yet use DECFLOAT in the ABAP backend.

Best regards
Mathias.

entry.title: Issue while using BOM and MRP alongside Project System
entry.content:
Hi All, 

For a Customer I am working for has this issue while MRP run, Asking all the Gurus out there to kindly provide me any resolution.

 

In a Project based environment; Material A procured externally with base UOM as EA, is used as a BOM component for Material B,

BOM Usage for 1 EA of B = 0.240M2 of A

While running MRP w.r.t. WBS (which requires 24 EA of B to be produced) using MD51

the PR's generated should be for qty = 0.24*24 =5.76 M2 ~~2 EA

as 1 EA of A =3.125 M2,

System is generating PR's for 13 Qyt.

 

I have maintained conversion in Material master for material A, also tried with maintain the alternate UOM as M2, it still shows the same results.

So I think they don't need to divided it to many batches, just input the date of production.

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: Can you debug at the implement code?

entry.title: Is it possible to trigger a GRC Function or Risk Approver Workflow on Demand?
entry.content: Hi community, we have a requirement to force the review of the content of Functions, Mitigating Controls, and Risks annually.  The workflow should route the objects to the internal teams and they can specify that the functions, risks, etc., are still worded properly, need to be active, etc.  We can use the standard workflow processes (SAP_GRAC_FUNC_APPR, SAP_GRAC_RISK_APPR, SAP GRAC_CONTROL_MAINT) to gather the approvals.  However, these workflows only trigger when a new object is created or if an existing object is edited.  Is there a way to start the workflows on demand without have to edit the objects?

entry.title: Re: Issues with Message Mapping
entry.content: I am guessing you got the "GET Response" using the browser (and not CPI)? Don't use the structure you get from the browser. Simply add a Request Reply step in CPI, specify the URL in it and make sure to select "Generate XML Schema definition". Fire off a test message and you will get the proper response XSD that can be used in Message mapping.

entry.title: VAT in Public Cloud
entry.content:
How is OSS VAT managed in the Public Cloud, i.e. sales to EU citizens without VAT numbers in a B2C scenario?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Welcome!
entry.content: I am not able to proceed further for registration

entry.title: Re: VAT in Public Cloud
entry.content:
The following notes explain how it work business to non-EU countries:

2765888 - Brexit: Guidelines for taxes in Sales relevant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

2999933 - BREXIT: Preparation in your S/4 HANA Cloud system

entry.title: Integration between S4 and C4 for Customer Group field KVGR1 to C4C
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

We need to map a standard SAP field to a field in C4C.

Is there a standard mapping available for Field Name KVGR1 from S4 to C4C?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Integration between S4 and C4 for Customer Group fiel...
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

We analyzed the question and, by standard design, the field KVGR1 is not mapped from S/4HANA | ERP to C4C.

Therefore, the best approach to do that is creating your own custom mapping as per the SAP Blog post Extending standard integration flow to support Customer extensions - Part I

 

Also, you can evaluate and, depends on your business needs, you can create a new custom field in C4C and map it to your S/4HANA | ERP. For that, please refer the SAP Blog post Steps to create Custom fields in C4C and extend it to integrated system(ECC).

 

I hope these blogs help you to achieve your business needs.

Best Regards,

Victor

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Welcome!
entry.content: @Sivaiah_Bhiragani  - Replace the scnId.Here part of the URL with your actual SCN ID.  Your actual URL should be: https://devrel-tools-prod-scn-badges-srv.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/devtoberfestContest/1620808

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
A Seasoned Supply Chain Manager Seeking SAP S/4HANA Certification

I am a seasoned Supply Chain Manager with over 12 years of experience in the industry. I have a proven track record of successfully managing and optimizing supply chain processes. 

I am proficient in Inventory Management, Operations, Data Management, Supply Chain Management, Warehouse Management, Production and Planning. Currently, I am working at Gul Ahmed Textile Mills.

Driven by a desire to expand my skill set and stay at the forefront of technological Advancements, I am keen to pursue SAP Certification in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement. I recognize the transformative potential of SAP S/4HANA in streamlining supply chain operations and improving efficiency.

By obtaining this certification, I aim to enhance my proficiency in SAP S/4HANA's sourcing and procurement functionalities. This will enable me to leverage the platform to optimize purchasing processes, manage supplier relationships effectively, and drive cost savings.

#SAP #SAPCertification #SupplyChain #SupplyChainManagement #SAPS4HANA #Sourcing #Procurement

entry.title: Re: Validation on GO Button in List Report
entry.content: List Report - Created using CDS service.

entry.title: Re: Error message no 06217 - Net Price in XXX becomes to...
entry.content:
Buenas tardes,

 

El error puede generarse por el maestro del material utilizado.

Por favor verifique el material con la MM03 en la vista CONTABILIDAD 1

Sap multiplica el valor del campo marcado por la cantidad y cotizacion ingresada y alli se produce el error.

Deberia corregir la cantidad, recomiendo dejarlo en cantidad  base 1 

Debe cambiar el precio por el valor unitario y con ello no deberia presentar el error

Saludos,

Eins, zwei, drei, vier 

# Deploying fluffy felines to solve Devoctoberfest challenges—because every bug needs a purr-fect distraction!
#petoberfest #devtoberfest

entry.title: FMS query to alert me when taxcode from inv1 and inv3 are different
entry.content: Hi experts! I need an FMS query for A/R invoice to alert me when taxcode from inv1 and inv3 are different. I need this to auto populate on an UDF before the invoice is added. I'm using SAPB1 ver.2005. Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Massage No. 06217-Overflow for net price field during...
entry.content:
Por favor,

 

Verfique el maestro del material en la transaccion MM03 vista CONTABILIDAD 1

Sap multiplica el valor marcado contra lo ingresado en el documento, produciendo asi el error.

Recomniendo cambiar la cantidad base a 1 y ingresar el valor unitario con eso el error ya no deberia producirse.

Saludos

entry.title: Re: How to add External Libraries to a SAP Fiori Elements...
entry.content:
I created a small demo project for that case: 

https://github.com/petermuessig/ui5demo.google.maps/tree/main

It consumes GoogleMaps via the URL inside a Custom UI5 Control. This control ensures that the script loading and the rendering is integrated into UI5's lifecycle: https://github.com/petermuessig/ui5demo.google.maps/blob/main/webapp/control/GMap.js

Now the GMap can be easily used in an XMLView: https://github.com/petermuessig/ui5demo.google.maps/blob/main/webapp/view/Main.view.xml#L16-L22 

There might be also other options to integrate Google Maps via the Loader or the suggested inline script - but this would be a bit more complicated than the URL way and especially the loader from NPM requires then the usage of ui5-tooling-modules - but this loader script would handle the loading implemented in the custom control above.

HTH

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Clean Core Extensibility with ABAP Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

entry.title: Re: Set and Get custom HTTP Header

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sapui5-whitelist-custom-http-headers-on-webide/ba-p/13302519

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

I have found immense value in the learning journeys, “Discovering SAP Business Technology Platform” and “Developing with SAP Integration Suite.” These courses have significantly advanced my understanding of SAP technologies and equipped me with practical skills that have directly contributed to my role. I am eager to continue my professional development by pursuing the P_BTPA_2408 SAP Certified Professional - Solution Architect - SAP BTP certification, which I believe is a crucial step in aligning my expertise with SAP's latest innovations.

Given my circumstances as the sole earner for my family in Pakistan, where economic challenges are significant, I would be deeply appreciative if I could receive a free SAP Certification Code and continued access to the SAP Learning Hub. This support would be invaluable in helping me achieve this important certification and further my career.

Thank you for considering my request. I remain committed to advancing my skills and leveraging the knowledge gained through SAP's offerings to create greater value in my professional journey. I would be grateful for any assistance you could provide.

I look forward to your response.

Warm regards,
Muhammad Zohaib
sgmzohaib

SAP BTP, serverless runtime SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment Object Store on SAP BTP Redis on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

entry.title: Re: Synchronizing only some ChangeSet Creation requests
entry.content: I think you can still try the Upload Categories. Set them on each transaction in the change set to the same value and then try upload by category and see if that works.

entry.title: Re: how to get all the dates enetered in the date range prompt in webi report even if not in DB tabl
entry.content: Do you have a calendar table in your database? If so, create a third query over the calendar table with the same prompts as the query containing the entry date field. Merge dimensions on the entry date and the calendar table date. Use the merged dimension in the report to get all dates. If you don't have a calendar table, then create an excel spreadsheet with all the dates for every year and build your third query over the excel spreadsheet.

entry.title: Problem in the deployment of the CAP project
entry.content:
Hello experts, I hope you are well.

I am currently performing my first backup to hana database and I am encountering a mapping error but according to me, everything looks correct.

 

 

Error: com.sap.hana.di.tabledata: A column mapping "DESCRIPTION" : "Description" is specified, but the column "Description" cannot be found in the CSV file "com.logali.materials-Currencies.csv" [8251506]
at "src/gen/data/com.logali.materials-Currencies.hdbtabledata" (21:26,/imports[0]/column_mappings)
Error: com.sap.hana.di.tabledata: Could not parse the data mappings [8251524]
at "src/gen/data/com.logali.materials-Currencies.hdbtabledata" (0:0)
Error: com.sap.hana.di.tabledata: Deploying "src/gen/data/com.logali.materials-Currencies.hdbtabledata$0.expand"... failed [8212145]
at "src/gen/data/com.logali.materials-Currencies.hdbtabledata$0.expand" (0:0)

 

 


Entity declaration Currencies:

 

 

context materials {
    entity Currencies {
        key ID          : String(3);
            Description : localized String;
    }
}

 

 

File com.logali.materials-Currencies.csv:

 

 

ID,Description
USD,Dollar
EUR,Euro

 

 

and file com.logali.materials-Currencies_texts

 

 

locale,ID,Description
en,USD,Dollar
es,USD,Dolar
en,USD,EuroEN
es,USD,EuroES

 

 

com.logali.materials-Currencies.hdbtabledata: ( 8251506 A column mapping "DESCRIPTION" : "Description" is specified, but the column "Description" cannot be found in the CSV file "com.logali.materials-Currencies.csv"HDI Deploy(/imports[0]/column_mappings) )

 

{
  "format_version": 1,
  "imports": [
    {
      "target_table": "COM_LOGALI_MATERIALS_CURRENCIES",
      "source_data": {
        "data_type": "CSV",
        "file_name": "com.logali.materials-Currencies.csv",
        "has_header": true,
        "type_config": {
          "delimiter": ","
        }
      },
      "import_settings": {
        "import_columns": [
          "ID",
          "DESCRIPTION"
        ],
        "include_filter": []
      },
      "column_mappings": {
        "ID": "ID",
        "DESCRIPTION": "Description"
      }
    }
  ]
}

entry.title: Visual Studio Code - Issues to access standard library/component after App migration
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on a specific FIORI app that has been developped a few years ago with Web IDE, to manage Purchase Orders that can't be with standard tile.

Today, I have to make few changes on this app. So, I have migrated it on Visual Studio Code. 

At first sight, migration seems okay. But when I try to run the app (without making other changes than migration), it opens a blank page in my browser and there are error messages about standard component used by the app.

In my browser, I get :

  • Error : « failed to load JavaScript resource: sap/ui/s2p/mm/lib/reuse/text/library.js -  sap.ui.ModuleSystem » in Console tab.
  • Error below for file library.js in Network tab :

Request URL:        http://localhost:8080/resources/sap/ui/s2p/mm/lib/reuse/text/library.js
Request Method:   GET
Status Code:         404 NOT FOUND (from disk cache)
Remote Address:   [::1]:8080
Referrer Policy:     strict-origin-when-cross-origin

I sometimes have error directly in Visual Studio Code : « Failed to resolve library sap.ui.s2p.mm.lib.reuse.text: Could not find library "sap.ui.s2p.mm.lib.reuse.text" »

I have tried to change ui5.yaml file by adding a path under « backend » section like below, but it still KO.

 

          - path: /resources/sap/ui/s2p/mm/lib/reuse/text
            pathPrefix: /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/MM_REUSE_TEXTS1
            url: https://my.backend.com
            client: "200"

 

 

Any idea of what I can’t do to fix this issue ?

Thanks in advance for your help.

Armelle

entry.title: Re: Set Up Remote Debugging to Diagnose CAP Applications (Node.js Stack) at Runtime on SAP BTP, Clou
entry.content:

We were able to establish the ssh tunnel connection and attach the debugger to the node js app, but we are not seeing the server.js

entry.title: New Machine Learning features in SAP HANA Cloud 2024 Q3
entry.content:
With the 2024 Q3 database release, several new features have been released in the SAP HANA Cloud Predictive Analysis Library (PAL), an enhancement summary is available in the What’s new document for SAP HANA Cloud database 2024.28 (QRC 3/2024).

The feature highlights for the current release are described in more detail below

Vector analysis and Clustering enhancements

A new hierarchical density-based clustering (HDBSCAN) function is introduced, which builds

Cluster models based on a hierarchy-tree of clusters, in which the clusters may have a varying density. The respective best density-based clusters get extracted based on a stability criteria. It’s a trending and robust clustering method added to the Predictive Analysis Library.

Now Vector data can be analyzed using the HDBSCAN and DBSCAN clustering functions. This facilitates detection of grouping patterns in vector data as well as scenarios like anomaly detections.

 

AutoML and ML pipelines enhancements

New data-parallel AutoML and ML Pipeline modeling functions allow for developing and executing multiple models in parallel by

  • building AutoML classification, regression or time series models in parallel on data subsets, identified by a grouping column,
  • using the new massive AutoML and PipelineSQL procedures
    PAL_MASSIVE_AUTOML_FIT, PAL_MASSIVE_PIPELINE_FIT,
    PAL_MASSIVE_PIPELINE_SCORE,
    PAL_MASSIVE_PIPELINE_PREDICT, PAL_MASSIVE_PIPELINE_EXPLAIN.

This allows for fastest parallel AutoML modeling, like e.g. segmented AutoML time series. At the same time SAP HANA Cloud’s database workload management is best applied to control and limit compute resource consumed.

 

For improved use of custom AutoML scenario configurations, a new configuration verification parameter (VERIFY_CONFIG) is introduced, for verification of correct operator and parameter usage in the AutoML scenario definition.

 

Further classification, regression and time series enhancements

Multi-task MLP enhancements

  • Batch training on complete dataset for improved MLP neural network models
  • New Residual Neural Network-type (ResNet) support, for very deep networks with more than 100 layers,
    allowing it to capture complex patterns at different levels of abstractions (network depths).

Long term time series (LTSF) enhancements

  • New model types supporting time series data normalization, yielding more robust models wrt changing mean or variance over time (reverse instance normalization with Rlinear and RMLP)

 

 

Python Machine Learning client (hana-ml) enhancements

The full list of new methods and enhancements with hana_ml 2.22  is summarized in the changelog for hana-ml 2.22.240917 as part of the documentation. The key enhancements in this release include

AutoML and pipeline modeling improvements

  • Massive, data parallel AutoML support (MassiveAutomaticClassification, MassiveAutomaticRegression, MassiveAutomaticTimeSeries)
  • Support for pipeline definition input as JSON-string to Pipeline-methods
    (e.g. explicit input of AutoML best pipeline as JSON-string)

 

New and enhanced PAL algorithm methods

  • New outlier detection for regression modeling hana_ml.algorithms.pal.preprocessing.OutlierDetectionRegression
  • Enhanced text classification with model function hana_ml.text.tm.TextClassificationWithModel
  • New multi-task MLP for multi-label classification, multi-target regressions hana_ml.algorithms.pal.neural_network.MLPMultiTaskClassifier and MLPMultiTaskRegressor enabling multi-label classification or multi-target regression scenarios.
    • Using a multi-task learning neural network, a single ML model allows to predict multiple, related target columns at once, as the model captures both common features across tasks as well as task-specific information with the same prediction model.
    • It leverages the commonalities between related tasks to improve the performance, generalization, and training efficiency, and moreover enables efficient use of data, better feature extraction, knowledge transfer, regularization, and end-to-end learning.
    • Furthermore, the function supports early stopping using validation data to avoid overfitting.
    • Users of the new multi-task MLP also benefit from shorter MLP training times
      and models with improved accuracy.

For a detailed use case introduction see the following blog Advancing to Multi-task Multilayer Perceptron: a new Neural Network design in SAP HANA Cloud

Misc. further enhancements

  • New dataset report style alignment
  • Re-use of ConnectionContext with SQLALCHEMY with to_sqlalchemy function
  • Model storage enhancements with model card support hana_ml.algorithms.pal.model_cards.create_model_card and parse_model_card
  • Increment-type with time series make_future_dataframe
  • HANA scheduler setting for output table schema

You can find an examples notebook illustrating the highlighted feature enhancements here 24QRC03_2.22.ipynb.

entry.title: Handling GR Inbound Resource in PPDS RRP3 - Product view
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Am new to PPDS and in progress of learning it.

My client has reported following issue wherein, a HANDLING resource appears in RRP3 (Product View) and also shows up in PPDS Planning Board, but which is NOT included in Master Recipe anywhere. Issue is that, this Resource adds up 1hr from the actual Resource end time say 1pm, and ends up in false time as 2pm for the Process Order. It is marked with indicator as GOODS RECEIPT.

As far as i explored, i can see this HANDLING Resource is included in LOCATION under RESOURCE Inbound/Outbound. Can this be the Reason.

Kindly advise how to delink this Resource from scheduling the Process Order.

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: ABAP Cloud access to Stack variables
entry.content:
Hello SAP ABAP experts.

Is there any way to read the value for ABAP stack variables on ABAP Cloud?

entry.title: SAP Build - Desktop Agent 3 waiting for a project to be loaded
entry.content:
Hi, I'm doing the "Process and approve your invoices with SAP Build Process Automation" missison from SAP Discovery Center using a SAP BTP Trial account and Desktop Agent 3 Version 3.32.58

 

I make a copy of the sample project and modify it to not use the destination "sap_process_automation_document_store".

 

I did some test and it worked fine.

 

Testing again, the desktop agent get in a loop reading the invoice, so i had to cancel the instance.

 

After that, the Desktop Agent stop acepting projects.

 

I went to C:Users/Username/AppData/Local/SAP/Intelligent RPA and the "Projects" folder is missing.

 

How can I make the agent recognize projects?.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Is there a new App for "ILM Policies" ?
entry.content:
Is there a new App for "ILM Policies" ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there a new App for "ILM Policies" ?
entry.content: The ILM Policies app will be deprecated with SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502 and will be replaced by configuration activity Maintain ILM Policies and Rules. See the ILM Policies SAP Help Page for more information.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano , 

 I am Interested in participating in the digital skills initiative. I have over 2 years of professional experience in SAP HCM R/3 system. Now, I wants to improve my skills and career by learning SAP Successfactors EC. With this Digital program I can achive my goal(SAP Certified Associate). I already accomplished the record of achievement in SAP Successfactors EC which leads to Certification. 

Thank You in advance and for this post.

 

Regards,

Narendra Mamilla,

SAP HCM Functional Consultant.

entry.title: Re: The OnPremise proxy type only supports http schema fo...
entry.content: Your URL does only contain protocol and path but not a FQDN.

entry.title: Re: Pixelated / Low Resolution Image in the Image Control
entry.content:
@bill_froelich 

Samsung A9+ (SM-X210) on Android 14.0

entry.title: Re: #Multivalue Error
entry.content: You're getting #MULTIVALUE because there is more than one employee stream associated with EMP3

entry.title: Announcing the first “Evento Internacional para la Distribución de Gas” Buenos Aires, Argentina. Feb
entry.content:
The first edition of the international event for gas distribution in Latin America seeks to share knowledge and experiences in the digital transformation of natural gas distribution companies, and to address practices and lessons learned in the adoption of new technologies, based on the exchange of information among peers and the exploration of successful use cases.

The meeting aims to highlight recent innovations in natural gas distribution technology by showcasing success stories in digital transformation.

Some highlights of the agenda:

  • Key note of welcome
  • Challenges of energy in Latin America in the international context
  • Operational Efficiency
  • Commercial Efficiency
  • Sustainability

Thanks to our sponsor IBM, the Executive Networking Dinner help attendees to join an executive community that extends beyond the meeting, gaining knowledge from  peers and other companies, partners and vendors.

For those interested to join and take part in our discussions we have set up a registration website where updates on agenda and other useful information is as well...

Looking forward to see you in Buenos Aires!

entry.title: Re: Editable Data Table and Searches
entry.content: Thank you Bill for your time. I will try your suggestions. After the tests I will return back for the Accepted Solution.

entry.title: Re: How to consolidate rows in a LOOP with same PO number...
entry.content: Yes I used Collect along with At New Po_number and it worked for me

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
